editions.name: The Red Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Red Edition with a refreshing Watermelon taste

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated worldwide by top athletes, students, and professionals, as well as during long journeys behind the wheel

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Wings without sugar: Red Bull Sugarfree is a Red Bull energy drink without sugar

editions.name: The Yellow Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Yellow Edition. Surprises with the exotic taste of Tropical Fruits

editions.name: The Peach Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Peach Edition offers the taste of White Peach with a hint of citrus zest and floral notes
